## Goal

What item, collection, or gap is this issue supposed to address?

## Source or archive

Which archive, institution, or search surface should be used?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Source item(s) identified
- [ ] Provenance and citation captured
- [ ] Canonical record path decided (`records.jsonl`, `vault`, or both)
- [ ] Any release-facing impact noted
